revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 9 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 9 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月9日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]]_月_日） - 「午砲の制」発布。江戸城旧本丸で正午に大砲を1発打ち時刻を知らせることが決まる

== 忌日 == * [[朱鳥]]元年（[[686年]][[10月1日]]） - [[天武天皇]]、40代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1763年]][[10月15日]]） - [[谷文晁]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1841年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[10月16日]]） - [[徳川斉順]]、第11代[[紀州藩]]主（+ [[1846年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[10月17日]]） - [[副島種臣]]、外務卿・内相（+ [[1905年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月6日]]） - [[平山信]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[朱鳥]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[686年]][[10月1日]]） - [[天武天皇]]、40代[[天皇]] * [[持統天皇]]5年（ユリウス暦[[691年]][[10月6日]]） - [[川島皇子]]、皇族（* [[657年]]） * [[永正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1504年]][[10月16日]]） - [[最上義淳]]、[[戦国大名]] * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[10月21日]]） - [[滝川一益]]、武将（* [[1525年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[重陽]]節 ** 菊御酒 （チクウジャキー） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では菊の葉を浮かべた酒を仏壇、火の神に供えて、家内安全を祈願する。
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

revision.comment: /* 記念日・年中行事 */ 高齢者の日追加。
revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月9日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月22日]]） - 「午砲の制」発布。[[江戸城]]旧本丸で[[正午]]に大砲を1発打ち時刻を知らせることが決まる
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1763年]][[10月15日]]） - [[谷文晁]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1841年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[10月16日]]） - [[徳川斉順]]、第11代[[紀州藩]]主（+ [[1846年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[10月17日]]） - [[副島種臣]]、外務卿・内相（+ [[1905年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月6日]]） - [[平山信]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[朱鳥]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[686年]][[10月1日]]） - [[天武天皇]]、40代[[天皇]] * [[持統天皇]]5年（ユリウス暦[[691年]][[10月6日]]） - [[川島皇子]]、皇族（* [[657年]]） * [[永正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1504年]][[10月16日]]） - [[最上義淳]]、[[戦国大名]] * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[10月21日]]） - [[滝川一益]]、武将（* [[1525年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[重陽]]節 ** 菊御酒 （チクウジャキー） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では菊の葉を浮かべた酒を仏壇、火の神に供えて、家内安全を祈願する。 * 高齢者の日（{{CHN}}、{{lang-zh|老年节}}） - [[中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法]]第9条で規定<ref name="jil">{{cite web|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[労働政策研究・研修機構]]|accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}}</ref>。

revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}, [[1871]]) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}}) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}}, [[1763]]) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}}, {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}, [[1801]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}}, 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]]). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}}, [[1828]]) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}}, {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]]). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}}, [[1867]]) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}}, {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]]).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}}, [[686]]) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}}, 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}}, [[691]]) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}}, Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}, [[1504]]) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}}. * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}, [[1586]]) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}}, samurai commander (b. [[1525]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}}, sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}}, {{lang-zh|老年节}}) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}}.<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}}|accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}}</ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}}, celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}}.
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}}, sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}}, {{lang-zh|老年节}}) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}}.<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}}|accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}}</ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}}, celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}}.

[[sn:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}, [[1871]]) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}}) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}}, [[1763]]) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}}, {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}, [[1801]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}}, 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]]). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}}, [[1828]]) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}}, {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]]). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}}, [[1867]]) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}}, {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]]).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}}, [[686]]) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}}, 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}}, [[691]]) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}}, Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}, [[1504]]) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}}. * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}, [[1586]]) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}}, samurai commander (b. [[1525]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}}, sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}}, {{lang-zh|老年节}}) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}}.<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}}|accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}}</ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}}, celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}}.

[[sn:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .

revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , qqth {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year qq of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160qq7131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , qqth {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year qq of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160qq7131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. * *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|持統天皇}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .

revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . == Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[1525]] ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also! ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]] == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] [[zh:九月初九]] [[en:draft:September 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島}} .
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

[[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益|12=draft}} , samurai commander (b. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益|12=draft|12=draft}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽|12=draft|12=draft}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県|12=draft|12=draft}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=draft|12=draft}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構|12=draft|12=draft}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=draft|12=draft}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島|12=draft|12=draft}} .

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初九]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城|12=draft|12=draft}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1763]] ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|ja|谷文晁|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyō|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|ja|紀州藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1828]] ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|ja|副島種臣|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1867]] ) – {{ill|Hirayama Shin|ja|平山信|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|ja|10月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1586]] ) – {{ill|Takikawa Kazumasu|ja|滝川一益|12=draft|12=draft}} , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽|12=draft|12=draft}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県|12=draft|12=draft}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=draft|12=draft}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構|12=draft|12=draft}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=draft|12=draft}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909}}

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Chōyō Festival|ja|重陽|12=draft|12=draft}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|ja|沖縄県|12=draft|12=draft}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN}} , {{lang-zh|老年节}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=draft|12=draft}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|ja|労働政策研究・研修機構|12=draft|12=draft}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=draft|12=draft}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|ja|奄美群島|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 9|qq=September 9}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|qq=}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|qq=}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|qq=}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|qq=}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|qq=}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|qq=}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|qq=}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .
== See Also ==

[[1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[1945]] ).

[[657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|qq=}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|qq=}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|qq=}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|qq=}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .

[[1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|qq=}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|qq=}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[1525]] ).

[[657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|qq=}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|qq=}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|qq=}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .
