<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840325]] Wikidata name: ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 9|qq=September 9}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[:en:1763|1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[:en:1841|1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1801|1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[:en:1846|1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[:en:1828|1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[:en:1905|1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:1867|1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[:en:1945|1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[:en:686|686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:691|691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .

[[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840325]] Wikidata name: ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 9|qq=September 9}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[:en:1763|1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[:en:1841|1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1801|1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[:en:1846|1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[:en:1828|1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[:en:1905|1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:1867|1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[:en:1945|1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[:en:686|686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:691|691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[:en:1763|1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[:en:1841|1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1801|1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[:en:1846|1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[:en:1828|1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[:en:1905|1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:1867|1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[:en:1945|1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[:en:686|686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:691|691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .
== See Also ==

== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840325]] Wikidata name: ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 9|qq=September 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[:en:1763|1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[:en:1841|1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1801|1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[:en:1846|1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[:en:1828|1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[:en:1905|1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:1867|1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[:en:1945|1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[:en:686|686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:691|691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|8|9|10|8|9|10|9|0909|qq=}}

[[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:9-ngie̍t 9-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:9月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初九]][[zh:九月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840325]] Wikidata name: ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 9|qq=September 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 22|October 22]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 15|October 15]] , [[:en:1763|1763]] ) – [[:en:Tani Bunchō|Tani Bunchō]] , [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (d. [[:en:1841|1841]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1801|1801]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th [[:en:Daimyo|Daimyō]] of [[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] (d. [[:en:1846|1846]] ). * Year 11 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 17|October 17]] , [[:en:1828|1828]] ) – [[:en:Soejima Taneomi|Soejima Taneomi]] , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. [[:en:1905|1905]] ). * Year 3 of [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:1867|1867]] ) – [[:en:Shin Hirayama|Hirayama Shin]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (d. [[:en:1945|1945]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 1|October 1]] , [[:en:686|686]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 6|October 6]] , [[:en:691|691]] ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. [[:en:657|657]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 16|October 16]] , [[:en:1504|1504]] ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 21|October 21]] , [[:en:1586|1586]] ) – [[:en:Takigawa Kazumasu|Takikawa Kazumasu]] , samurai commander (b. [[:en:1525|1525]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Ninth Festival|Double Ninth Festival]] Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]] , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher=[[:en:Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training]] |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the [[:en:Amami Islands|Amami Islands]] .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|WD=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15}} , {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763}} ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|en|Tani Bunchō|WD=Q1375891|lt=Tani Bunchō}} , {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter}} (d. {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=Daimyō}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|WD=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain}} (d. {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} , {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|en|Soejima Taneomi|WD=Q702789|lt=Soejima Taneomi}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} ) – {{ill|Shin Hirayama|en|Shin Hirayama|WD=Q4497856|lt=Hirayama Shin}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer}} (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|WD=Q777413|lt=Shuchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1}} , {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691}} ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. {{ill|657|en|657|WD=Q31090|lt=657}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1504|en|1504|WD=Q6148|lt=1504}} ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} , {{ill|1586|en|1586|WD=Q6739|lt=1586}} ) – {{ill|Takigawa Kazumasu|en|Takigawa Kazumasu|WD=Q953624|lt=Takikawa Kazumasu}} , samurai commander (b. {{ill|1525|en|1525|WD=Q6314|lt=1525}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands}} .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|WD=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15}} , {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763}} ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|en|Tani Bunchō|WD=Q1375891|lt=Tani Bunchō}} , {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter}} (d. {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=Daimyō}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|WD=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain}} (d. {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} , {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|en|Soejima Taneomi|WD=Q702789|lt=Soejima Taneomi}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} ) – {{ill|Shin Hirayama|en|Shin Hirayama|WD=Q4497856|lt=Hirayama Shin}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer}} (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|WD=Q777413|lt=Shuchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1}} , {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691}} ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. {{ill|657|en|657|WD=Q31090|lt=657}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1504|en|1504|WD=Q6148|lt=1504}} ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} , {{ill|1586|en|1586|WD=Q6739|lt=1586}} ) – {{ill|Takigawa Kazumasu|en|Takigawa Kazumasu|WD=Q953624|lt=Takikawa Kazumasu}} , samurai commander (b. {{ill|1525|en|1525|WD=Q6314|lt=1525}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands}} .

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands}} .

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) – The "Noon Cannon System" ({{ill|午砲の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/午砲の制|qq=}} ) was enacted, establishing the practice of firing a cannon at noon from the former main keep of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|WD=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle}} to signal the time.
== Births == * Year 13 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15}} , {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763}} ) – {{ill|Tani Bunchō|en|Tani Bunchō|WD=Q1375891|lt=Tani Bunchō}} , {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter}} (d. {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Saijun|ja|徳川斉順|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Saijun|1=Tokugawa Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993203}} , 11th {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=Daimyō}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|WD=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain}} (d. {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} , {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} ) – {{ill|Soejima Taneomi|en|Soejima Taneomi|WD=Q702789|lt=Soejima Taneomi}} , {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外務大臣 (日本)|1=Minister for Foreign Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} ) – {{ill|Shin Hirayama|en|Shin Hirayama|WD=Q4497856|lt=Hirayama Shin}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer}} (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|WD=Q777413|lt=Shuchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1}} , {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6}} , {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691}} ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. {{ill|657|en|657|WD=Q31090|lt=657}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} , {{ill|1504|en|1504|WD=Q6148|lt=1504}} ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Mogami Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} , {{ill|1586|en|1586|WD=Q6739|lt=1586}} ) – {{ill|Takigawa Kazumasu|en|Takigawa Kazumasu|WD=Q953624|lt=Takikawa Kazumasu}} , samurai commander (b. {{ill|1525|en|1525|WD=Q6314|lt=1525}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands}} .

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival|1=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture|1=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=Q10872177|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|1=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands|1=Amami Islands}} .

wikidata|WD=Q1355043}} and Minister of Home Affairs (d. {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6|1=October 6}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Shin Hirayama|en|Shin Hirayama|WD=Q4497856|lt=Hirayama Shin|1=Shin Hirayama}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer|1=Astronomer}} (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|WD=Q777413|lt=Shuchō|1=Shuchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}} , {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686|1=686}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , 40th emperor of Japan. * Year 5 of {{ill|Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|WD=Q2928|lt=October 6|1=October 6}} , {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691|1=691}} ) – {{ill|Prince Kawashima|ja|川島皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Kawashima|qq=}} , Japanese imperial prince (b. {{ill|657|en|657|WD=Q31090|lt=657|1=657}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}} , {{ill|1504|en|1504|WD=Q6148|lt=1504|1=1504}} ) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshizumi|ja|最上義淳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogami Yoshizumi|1=Q11091680|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11091680}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} . * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} , {{ill|1586|en|1586|WD=Q6739|lt=1586|1=1586}} ) – {{ill|Takigawa Kazumasu|en|Takigawa Kazumasu|WD=Q953624|lt=Takikawa Kazumasu|1=Takigawa Kazumasu}} , samurai commander (b. {{ill|1525|en|1525|WD=Q6314|lt=1525|1=1525}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|WD=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival|1=Double Ninth Festival}} Festival. ** *Kiku-no-sake* (菊御酒, *Chikūjakī*) – In {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture|1=Okinawa Prefecture}} , sake with floating chrysanthemum petals is offered to household altars and fire gods to pray for family safety. * Senior Citizens' Day ({{CHN|qq=}} , {{lang-zh|老年节|qq=}} ) – Defined in Article 9 of the {{ill|PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|ja|中華人民共和国老年人権益保障法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/PRC Elderly Rights Protection Law|1=Q10872177|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10872177}} .<ref name="jil">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|title=「高齢者権益保障法」が7月に施行―「喜憂半々」の受け止め、期待と不安と|date=2013-07|publisher={{ill|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|en|Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|WD=Q6156651|lt=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training|1=Japan Institute for Labour Policy and Training}} |accessdate=2016-01-17|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160117131729/http://www.jil.go.jp/foreign/jihou/2013_7/china_05.html|archivedate=2016-01-17|qq=}} </ref> * {{ill|Kugatsukunchi|ja|クガツクンチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugatsukunchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , celebrated in the {{ill|Amami Islands|en|Amami Islands|WD=Q453510|lt=Amami Islands|1=Amami Islands}} .
